privileged_info_summary: The task metadata contains one factual error: Morpholine's USCG CHRIS code is listed as 'MPH' but the correct USCG code is 'MPL' according to the official USCG 46 CFR Part 150 Table 1 and CAMEO Chemicals database. All other metadata values are verified as correct: Acrylonitrile (ACN, Group 15), Styrene monomer (STY, Group 30), Sulfuric acid (SFA, Group 2), and Propionic acid (PNA, Group 4) all match the official USCG chemical classification standards. These are real, non-synthetic chemical classifications from the U.S. Coast Guard's mandatory cargo compatibility system for maritime bulk chemical transport.
